shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,_,L : value_profile RESOLVES, naive BLOCKS, cmplog & value_profile_cmplog non-decisive. Pure VP-PRO (CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient) family - VP's feedback is necessary and sufficient; I2S substitution (cmplog) is non-decisive.
decidable_reason: PARTIAL (re-affirmed FINAL, 2026-06-18). One hypothesis stands: vp_basin_escape, validated on 3 sB branches (bloaty_147, lcms_2147, lcms_2417) via the arbiter's canonical value_distance fallback, carried forward VERBATIM under the monotonic-superset invariant. The 8 UNLABELED branches (bloaty/11, bloaty/150, libxml2/6325_h1, libxml2/6655, harfbuzz/5708_h0, harfbuzz/6006, harfbuzz/6061_h1, sqlite3/14793) remain honestly decidable:false. This round closed the loop by checking the LAST untried built pivot the brief flagged (corpus_size_ratio) in addition to re-confirming the rounds-1-3 rejections of value_distance(match-gates), depth_reach, operand_enrichment/byte_freq_ratio, and joint_necessity/token_count. No built tool yields a G1-discriminating AND G2-independent signal for these 8. The VP advantage in this shape is a SEARCH-TRAJECTORY property: VP's CMP_MAP retains a monotone sequence of decreasing-residual near-miss intermediates that naive discards; the TERMINAL resolving/blocking seed sets contain no fingerprint of that trajectory distinct from the circular fact that a resolving seed already contains/reaches the answer while the blocking seed sits at a different VALID dispatch value (not a measurable mid-gradient near-miss).

hypotheses.label: VP CMP_MAP steers AWAY from a dominant magic-value basin: there is no single target literal - the true side wants ANY value but the corpus-dominant magic. VP-resolving seeds DEPART the basin (multi-modal: spread over several non-magic format magics), while naive-blocking seeds are pinned at the basin value.

metric_definitions.naive_basin_lock_fraction: fraction of naive-BLOCKING seeds whose 4-byte prefix == the corpus-dominant magic (00 61 73 6d).
metric_definitions.vp_value_modality: count of DISTINCT non-magic 4-byte prefix values across the vp-resolving seed set (multi-modality test - a single-target gradient would be ~uni-modal at one constant; basin escape is multi-modal).
metric_definitions.basin_departure_lift: naive_basin_lock_fraction - vp_basin_lock_fraction (positive => VP escaped the basin that pinned naive).

hypotheses.prediction: G1: naive-blocking seeds are basin-locked (high naive_basin_lock_fraction) while VP-resolving seeds have left the basin (low vp_basin_lock_fraction) AND spread over MULTIPLE distinct non-magic prefixes (vp_value_modality >= 3). The direct-literal alternative predicts the opposite signature: VP seeds CONVERGING on ONE target value (low modality, ~uni-modal). This is the decisive separator from a fixed-target gradient: basin escape is divergence-AWAY-from-one-value (multi-modal), literal gradient is convergence-TOWARD-one-value (uni-modal).

hypotheses_tried: vp_structural_assembly_gradient (struct_size_ratio on harfbuzz_5708_h0 derived kern fields)
vp_basin_escape (value_distance away from corpus_dominant_basin, multi-modal, on bloaty_11)
round_0.outcome: ALL refuted (rule_not_met) across the 8 scorable branches; several branches had all three rules score-and-fail.

round_1_2.outcome: Declared the unlabeled set decidable:false; vp_basin_escape later RESTORED (sB monotonic-superset) when it validated bloaty_147/lcms_2147/lcms_2417 via the canonical value_distance fallback.

round_3.outcome: Re-examined the two built tools never tried in this shape (depth_reach, joint_necessity/token_count) and CONFIRMED neither discriminates. No new mechanism added; G3 convergence held.

round_4_final.outcome: Closed the loop on the last brief-flagged untried pivot (corpus_size_ratio): rejected as non-discriminating (G1) + non-independent (G2). All built descriptors now explicitly exhausted for the 8. Loop declared DRY: decidable:false re-affirmed FINAL.

why_no_new_hypothesis.value_distance_match_gates_REJECTED: value_distance_reached toward the fixed gate literal (lcms nmcl, 0xD800, 0x093x, 0x0B05, '?' byte, SQL token) was tried in round 0 and refuted for the 8 unlabeled branches. The cards explain why it cannot work as an independent test: the VP-resolving seeds already CONTAIN the exact operand (vp_min_distance ~ 0 only because a resolving seed contains the answer - circular, G2), while the naive-BLOCKING seeds sit at a DIFFERENT VALID dispatch value (mntr instead of nmcl at lcms 0x0c-0x0f; a non-vowel codepoint at harfbuzz; punctuation/whitespace at sqlite3; the false-side default at libxml2), NOT a measurable mid-gradient near-miss. The intermediate near-miss inputs that VP retained and naive discarded - the only thing that would reveal the gradient - are in NEITHER terminal seed set. Re-running with a relaxed threshold is forbidden and would not change this.
why_no_new_hypothesis.depth_reach_REJECTED: depth_reach (seed_set:depth_reach:branch_line:per_branch) measures per-seed-normalized execution count of the branch line + blocked-side count (winner-resolving vs loser-blocking), the ctx/ngram ITERATION-DEPTH tool. It is NON-INDEPENDENT (G2) for every branch here. For the value-match branches (bloaty/150, libxml2/6325_h1, harfbuzz/6006, harfbuzz/6061_h1, sqlite3/14793) winner_deeper / side_lift just restates 'the winner takes the true side because it contains the value' = the resolve pattern. For the two structural/iterative branches that could in principle differ: (a) libxml2/6655 - the card shows naive-BLOCKING seeds DO reach the comparison (L6524 L = T:0 / F:28, hitting the line 28x on the false side), so loser_depth is not ~0; both arms reach the line and the only differentiator left is side_lift (true-side count) = the resolve pattern; (b) harfbuzz/5708_h0 - line 187 (!hb_ot_layout_has_machine_kerning) sits on the shaping path that runs for ANY font that loads, so 0x20-padded naive seeds still reach it; depth_lift collapses to side_lift = resolve pattern. In neither structural case does the loser fail to ARRIVE at the line (the only way depth_lift would carry signal beyond the resolve pattern). depth_reach is circular (G2) here.
why_no_new_hypothesis.operand_enrichment_byte_freq_ratio_REJEC: operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset) computes a CMPLOG-vs-naive enrichment. cmplog is NON-DECISIVE here and the label_source says I2S substitution is neither necessary nor sufficient, so a cmplog corpus has no expected gate-target enrichment - it would measure the wrong fuzzer. Repurposing the same descriptor VP-vs-naive is (a) NON-INDEPENDENT (G2): a VP-RESOLVING seed by definition carries the operand at the gate offset, so 'VP corpus enriched in the operand vs the naive blocking corpus' verifies the resolve pattern with itself; (b) NON-DISCRIMINATING (G1): an I2S-substitution alternative predicts the IDENTICAL enrichment. Same circular signal as round-0's refuted value_distance, at coarser resolution. Also: the structural branches (bloaty/11, harfbuzz/5708_h0) have no fixed operand offset and different-sized seed sets, so byte_freq_ratio returns no_gate_signature there.
why_no_new_hypothesis.joint_necessity_token_count_REJECTED: joint_necessity (seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch) compares vpc-RESOLVING vs cmplog-BLOCKING vs value_profile-BLOCKING seed sets (the vpc-needs-both assembly-depth subtype). In THIS shape vpc is NON-DECISIVE (the '_' in _,W,_,L) - there is no vpc-resolving arm and value_profile is the RESOLVER not a blocker, so the tool's premise (vpc assembles beyond what single techniques reach) does not exist. The token_count metric on a VP-vs-naive contrast would just count whether the resolving seed contains the SQL keyword / structural token it needs to resolve = circular (G2), and an I2S alternative predicts the identical token presence (non-discriminating, G1). Inapplicable.
why_no_new_hypothesis.corpus_size_ratio_REJECTED: corpus_size_ratio (a corpus_queue:corpus_size_ratio descriptor) contrasts saved-corpus sizes across fuzzers. It is NON-DISCRIMINATING (G1): a larger VP corpus is predicted identically by ANY feedback that simply admits more seeds (ctx, ngram, I2S, or VP), so it cannot separate the CMP_MAP-gradient mechanism from any alternative. It is also NON-INDEPENDENT/MISALIGNED (G2): total corpus size is a campaign-wide quantity conflating every blocker on the target, not a per-GATE measurement of THIS branch's gradient. A bigger corpus does not establish that VP climbed a distance gradient at this specific comparison. Inapplicable as a discriminating per-branch verification.
why_no_new_hypothesis.struct_size_exhausted: harfbuzz_5708_h0 (derived kern offset/length, operand_literal null) is the ONLY unlabeled branch whose discriminator is not pure operand-containment circularity. Round-0's vp_structural_assembly_gradient already measured it (struct_size_ratio, reusing joint_necessity's size metric) and it refuted. The branch's own analysis weakest_evidence_point concedes the CMP_MAP distance attribution 'is not directly observable in the prompt' - i.e. the structural-validity signal is inferred, not measured in the terminal corpus. No sharper untried framing exists in the signature.
why_no_new_hypothesis.bloaty_11_basin_only_on_label_source: bloaty_11 is the analytic seed of the basin-escape mechanism (it is the vp_basin_escape hypothesis member). Its value_distance-away-from-basin test is the SAME measurement that validated 3 sB branches; bloaty_11 itself is on s4-absent corpus / scored by its owning server under the carried-forward vp_basin_escape rule. It is therefore NOT in the decidable:false set as a missing-mechanism case - it carries vp_basin_escape. (Listed under decidable_false_unlabeled below only because s4 has not yet returned a verdict for it; the rule exists and is monotone.)

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK, not a mutator, and is invisible in mutation_op - its effect is a search-trajectory property; no seed_lineage 'gradient event' is measurable, and the terminal seed-set tools (byte-distance, struct-size, depth, token-count, corpus-size) cannot recover the retained near-miss intermediates that constitute the gradient.
I2S is untagged in mutation_op and cmplog is NON-DECISIVE here, so operand_enrichment (the cmplog-vs-naive byte_freq_ratio tool) is irrelevant to verifying the VP mechanism of this shape.
joint_necessity requires a vpc-RESOLVING arm; vpc is non-decisive ('_') in this shape, so the assembly-depth / token_count contrast has no arm to compute.

harfbuzz_5708_h0 and bloaty_11 are structural-assembly gates with no fixed operand offset and different-sized winning vs blocking seeds, so byte-alignment (byte_freq_ratio / fixed-operand distance) is FORBIDDEN there - leaving only struct_size_ratio (round-0, refuted) and value_distance-away-from-basin (the basin-escape rule).

on-disk corpora exist only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 on s4 and lcms/libxml2/libpng/bloaty on sB; cross-server, the owning server arbitrates its own targets. The binding constraint here is DISCRIMINABILITY, not corpus access - no branch is marked decidable:false merely for absent local corpus.

branch_disposition.note: All 12 branches carry the same real mechanism (VP CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient that naive lacks), taken from the Layer-1 resolve pattern (label_source). That label STANDS as the analytic shape assignment. vp_basin_escape's value_distance fallback independently confirmed 3 of them on sB. For the remaining 8, what is decidable:false is the INDEPENDENT real-data VERIFICATION (G2): no built tool (value_distance-to-literal, depth_reach, operand_enrichment/byte_freq_ratio, joint_necessity/token_count, struct_size_ratio, corpus_size_ratio) produces a signal that confirms this mechanism without re-reading the resolve pattern itself.

notes.verdict: PARTIAL decidable: 1 confirmed hypothesis (vp_basin_escape, 3 branches), 8 branches honestly decidable:false. This is the canonical G3 case - the mechanism is genuine but leaves no terminal-corpus fingerprint independent of the circular 'a resolving seed contains/reaches the answer while the blocking seed sits at a different VALID dispatch value, not a mid-gradient near-miss'. Round 4 closed the loop on the last untried built pivot (corpus_size_ratio); every built descriptor is now explicitly exhausted. Inventing a forced label would be the chase-100% / multiple-comparisons failure mode the design forbids.
notes.loop_terminated_dry: Across rounds 0-4 the candidate built tools have been exhausted: value_distance_reached (to-literal, refuted r0), struct_size_ratio (refuted r0), value_distance-away-from-basin (basin escape, the surviving rule), depth_reach (G2-circular r3), operand_enrichment/byte_freq_ratio (wrong-fuzzer + G1/G2 circular), joint_necessity/struct_size_and_token_count/token_count (no vpc-resolving arm), corpus_size_ratio (G1 non-discriminating + per-gate misaligned, r4). No untried built descriptor remains.
notes.what_would_change_this: A NEW measurement SOURCE capturing the search TRAJECTORY rather than the terminal corpus - e.g. a corpus-admission timeline (seed save times + parent operand-distance, showing VP saved a monotone sequence of decreasing-residual near-misses while naive saved none). That is a coverage_timeseries / seed_lineage-with-distance descriptor that is NOT built and is gated by data_realities (CMP_MAP admission is not lineage-tagged). Until such a tool exists, these 8 branches stay decidable:false rather than mislabeled.

monotonic_superset_restorations.reason: carried forward verbatim from rounds 2/3; validated 3 sB branches via the arbiter's canonical value_distance fallback (winner_closer AND distance_gap>=0.15). Monotonic-superset invariant: KEEP unchanged so the confirmed branches re-validate.
